profile.name: Sai Karthik K
profile.tagline: Passionate about Embedded Systems, AI, IoT, Automotive Technologies, and Software Development — building practical solutions through continuous learning and hands-on projects.
profile.specialization: Embedded Systems · IoT · AI/ML · Software Development · Automotive
profile.bio: M.Tech student specializing in Embedded Systems Technology, with a strong foundation across embedded systems, firmware development, software development, IoT, and artificial intelligence. I work hands-on with RTOS, embedded Linux, hardware–software integration, computer vision, and sensor interfacing, and I'm seeking opportunities in embedded systems, firmware engineering, software development, AI/ML, IoT, and automotive embedded systems.

coreDomains.name: Embedded Systems
coreDomains.description: Strong fundamentals from an M.Tech specialization, with hands-on hardware–software integration and sensor interfacing.

coreDomains.name: Embedded Software
coreDomains.description: Embedded C firmware development for real-time, resource-constrained systems, from bring-up through validation.

coreDomains.name: Internet of Things (IoT)
coreDomains.description: Connected, sensor-driven devices — from environment monitoring to automated smart-device control.

coreDomains.name: Artificial Intelligence
coreDomains.description: Applying AI to real-world embedded and software problems, from voice interaction to automation.

coreDomains.name: Machine Learning
coreDomains.description: Foundational ML knowledge applied alongside embedded and computer-vision coursework and projects.

coreDomains.name: Computer Vision
coreDomains.description: Real-time vision pipelines for gesture and hand-tracking based interaction.

coreDomains.name: Edge AI
coreDomains.description: Interest in running intelligent, energy-aware logic directly on-device, explored through edge-computing based embedded projects.

coreDomains.name: Automotive Technologies
coreDomains.description: Domain knowledge in automotive embedded systems as part of a broader embedded-systems specialization.

coreDomains.name: Software Development
coreDomains.description: Solid CS fundamentals and software engineering practice underpinning every embedded and AI project.

experience.summary: Supported board-level design and validation for production-bound embedded hardware.
highlights: Assisted in PCB design, schematic analysis, component placement, and layout verification.
Supported prototype assembly, testing, and hardware validation for embedded boards.
Performed circuit debugging and troubleshooting to ensure reliable hardware performance.

experience.summary: Built firmware and integrated sensors for real-time embedded applications.
highlights: Assisted in developing Embedded C firmware and hardware–software integrated applications.
Integrated sensors and peripherals for real-time embedded system development.
Performed debugging, testing, and validation to ensure reliable system performance.

projects.title: Smart Indoor Environment Monitoring System
projects.description: A multi-sensor ESP32 system tracking indoor air quality with a computed Indoor Health Index (IHI) and automated alerts when conditions drift.
highlights: Developed an ESP32-based multi-sensor indoor environment monitoring system.
Implemented real-time environmental monitoring with an Indoor Health Index (IHI) and automated alerts.

projects.title: AI Voice Assistant Using ESP32
projects.description: An ESP32-based voice assistant for real-time command recognition and device control, integrating voice recognition with wireless communication for smart-device automation.
highlights: Developed an ESP32-based AI voice assistant for real-time voice command recognition and device control.
Integrated voice recognition and wireless communication for smart IoT device automation.

projects.title: Hand Gesture-Based Volume Control System
projects.description: A real-time, touch-free volume control system using hand tracking and gesture recognition.
highlights: Developed a real-time hand gesture-based volume control system using Python, OpenCV, and MediaPipe.
Implemented hand tracking and gesture recognition for touch-free volume adjustment.

projects.title: Energy-Aware Adaptive Irrigation Control
projects.description: An ESP32-based smart irrigation system with adaptive control driven by real-time soil-moisture data and energy-efficient scheduling via deep sleep mode.
highlights: Developed an ESP32-based smart irrigation system with adaptive irrigation control.
Implemented real-time soil moisture monitoring and energy-efficient irrigation using ESP32 deep sleep mode.
